case_title: WALSH, MATTHEW et al VS KASSMAN, RUSSELL

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,800.00 FILED BY WALSH, MATTHEW MCDONOUGH, JIM AS TO DEFENDANT KASSMAN, RUSSELL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-26-1998 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT KASSMAN, RUSSELL

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WALSH, MATTHEW MCDONOUGH, JIM RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KASSMAN, RUSSELL $4,800.00 PRINCIPAL, $46.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,846.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT KASSMAN, RUSSELL HEARING SET FOR JUL-13-1998 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
REM: MOVAC. SCHEDULED FOR 7-13-98 TO BE HEARD WITH SC. #772108.
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF JUL-13-1998, GRANTED
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WALSH, MATTHEW MCDONOUGH, JIM IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT KASSMAN, RUSSELL STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
